tasks.build: rm -rf static && mkdir -p static/game static/ai-debug static/training && tsc --project frontend/tsconfig.json && mv static/training-dashboard/*.js static/training/ && rmdir static/training-dashboard && cp frontend/game/index.html frontend/game/style.css static/game/ && cp frontend/ai-debug/index.html frontend/ai-debug/style.css static/ai-debug/ && cp frontend/training-dashboard/index.html frontend/training-dashboard/style.css static/training/ && deno run --allow-read=static --allow-write=static scripts/cache_bust_static.ts
